constraint.name: ca_academias_clases_horarios_users_lastnick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (lastnick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_academias_clases_horarios_users_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_academias_clases_horarios_academias_clases
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idclase) REFERENCES academias_clases (id) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
